pages.title: Summary
pages.text: The Biogas Digester allows you to ferment any food to produce biogas. To build a digester, you will need a biogas digester controller, a biogas digester input & output, and a cuboid area that is a complete and totally closed and less than 11x5x11 in size.

pages.title: Digester Controller
pages.text: The core that controls the entire digester can determine the current digester situation from information in its GUI. When there is a cuboid area that is a complete and totally closed and less than 11x5x11 in size, this area is determined to be the digester's fermentation chamber. Leakage may result in an explosion.

pages.title: Input & Output Port
pages.text: It must be placed on top of the biogas digester controller to facilitate the feeding of food into the digester or the extraction of digestate, and a gas canister can be attached to its side to extract the biogas from the digester.

pages.title: Gas Canister
pages.text: It can store any 6 Buckets of fluid, but of course it is mainly used for storing or utilising liquefied biogas, be careful not to store it too full or a serious explosion will occur!
